ddls:
CREATE TABLE "nodes" (
  "node_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node */,
  "node_name" TEXT /* Name of the node */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the node is deployed */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the node was last updated */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the node */,
  "mac_address" TEXT /* MAC address of the node */,
  "vendor" TEXT /* Vendor of the node */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the node */,
  "serial_number" TEXT /* Serial number of the node */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES node_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES node_locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_nodes_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES node_status ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "centrality_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each metric record */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node for which the metrics are calculated */,
  "page_rank" REAL /* PageRank value of the node */,
  "degree_centrality" REAL /* Degree Centrality value of the node */,
  "closeness_centrality" REAL /* Closeness Centrality value of the node */,
  "betweenness_centrality" REAL /* Betweenness Centrality value of the node */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metrics were calculated */,
  "calculated_by" TEXT /* Algorithm or method used to calculate the metrics */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_centrality_metrics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "network_connections" (
  "connection_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection */,
  "source_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the source node */,
  "target_node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the target node */,
  "connection_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection type */,
  "status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the connection status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the connection was created */,
  "bandwidth" INTEGER /* Bandwidth of the connection in Mbps */,
  "latency" REAL /* Latency of the connection in ms */,
  "packet_loss" REAL /* Packet loss rate of the connection */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("connection_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_connections_target_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_connections_connection_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("connection_type_id") REFERENCES connection_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_connections_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("status_id") REFERENCES connection_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_network_connections_source_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each node type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the node type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the node type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the location is situated */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the location is situated */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "node_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the connection type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the connection type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "connection_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each connection status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the connection status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the connection status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., network admin, analyst, manager) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, modify) */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Action taken by the user (e.g., updated node status, changed connection settings) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "anomaly_detection" (
  "anomaly_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each anomaly */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node where the anomaly was detected */,
  "anomaly_type" TEXT /* Type of anomaly (e.g., unusual traffic, unexpected node behavior) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the anomaly */,
  "detected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the anomaly was detected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("anomaly_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_anomaly_detection_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., node status, connection quality) */,
  "generated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the report was generated */,
  "report_data" TEXT /* Data contained in the report (e.g., node status, connection quality metrics) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "analytics" (
  "analytics_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analytics record */,
  "node_id" INTEGER /* ID of the node being analyzed */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the metric (e.g., CPU usage, memory usage) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the metric */,
  "collected_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the metric was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analytics_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analytics_node_id FOREIGN KEY ("node_id") REFERENCES nodes ("node_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role to which the permission belongs */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user to whom the role is assigned */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role being assigned */,
  "assigned_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
